assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly identifies the cluster setup (2 dev on Rapid, 2 prod on Stable) and includes specific dev environment validation section addressing Rapid channel clusters likely being already upgraded

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions mandatory resource requests, notes 'you can't control node pool upgrade strategy' and states 'GKE uses surge automatically' showing understanding of Autopilot limitations

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific kubectl command for API deprecation checks: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated'

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'ALL containers have resource requests specified (CPU/memory) - mandatory for Autopilot' and emphasizes this in the key notes section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes PDBs, 'No bare pods — all workloads managed by Deployments/StatefulSets/Jobs', and terminationGracePeriodSeconds requirements

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific gcloud command to verify cluster version: 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER_NAME --region REGION --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes multiple workload health checks: deployments at desired replica count, no CrashLoopBackOff pods, StatefulSets readiness, etc.

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Since your dev clusters on Rapid channel likely upgraded to 1.32 weeks ago, validate workload health there before prod auto-upgrades. This is your natural staging environment.'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the GKE release schedule or the ~1 month advance notice timeframe - only discusses maintenance windows and exclusions for managing timing
Post-upgrade checklist includes dedicated 'Observability & Performance' section with metrics pipeline, logging, error rates, and API latency validation

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response focuses on control plane maintenance windows and exclusions, correctly noting that node upgrades are automatically managed by GKE in Autopilot without recommending node-level exclusions
